summary: Iteration 2 testing for LoadLink Find Space filter (geocoding + 5-rule matching). Backend: 9/9 new pytest cases passed for /api/geocode/{pincode} - valid Delhi/Mumbai pincodes return correct lat/lon, 5-digit/non-digit return 400, unknown pincode returns {found:false}, second hit is fast (Mongo cache hit < 2s confirmed), no _id leak, seed loads (110001->400001, 110002->400002, 560001->600001) created cleanly. Frontend (390x844 mobile viewport): Find Space button visible at top of Load Market; modal opens with all 5 fields (origin/dest pincodes, weight kg, volume cuft, cargo chips); all 5 cargo types are exact match (Bags, Boxes, Pipes, Drums, Irregular) in BOTH the Find Space modal and Post Load form ('Carton' is fully removed). Invalid pincode (999999) shows inline error 'Pincode not found, please check and try again.' under that field and does not proceed. Valid filter (110001/400001 + Bags + 500kg + 100cuft) geocodes via /api/geocode, applies all 5 rules, sorts by total distance, closes modal, shows '6 trucks matched', shows 'Origin: X km away' and 'Destination: X km away' chips on each card, footer 'Distances are approximate (straight-line)' visible. Filter button shows orange dot badge when active. Clear (X Clear) button appears next to Find Space, clears filter, removes distance labels and resets to '9 trucks available'. Empty state with 'No matching trucks found. Try adjusting your cargo details or search within a wider area.' renders when zero matches (e.g., Irregular cargo type with no matching loads).

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'Image: style.tintColor is deprecated. Please use props.tintColor.' Located in cargoChipsRow truck-icon Image (~line 828 of index.tsx). Non-blocking; move tintColor from style prop to a top-level prop on Image.
Console warning still present: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents.' Originates from third-party (likely react-native-web Modal/DateTimePicker). Non-blocking.

action_items: Optional polish: fix 'Image style.tintColor is deprecated' warning in LoadCard by moving tintColor to a top-level Image prop instead of style.

Future-scale: synchronous `requests.get` is still used inside async /api/geocode and /api/pincode endpoints (blocks the event loop). Consider httpx.AsyncClient or run_in_executor for higher concurrency. Acceptable for current MVP traffic.

Backend negative geocode results are NOT cached (function returns early without insert when found=false). This means every request for an unknown pincode still hits Nominatim. Consider caching negative results with a short TTL to avoid hammering external service with bad pincodes.
Frontend session-level geoCache only stores positive (found=true) results, so each modal apply re-fetches negative results. Minor; rely on backend cache once added.
critical_code_review_comments: applyFilter loops sequentially with `await geocodePin(...)` inside a for-loop for each load (server.py side caching helps, but client could use Promise.all on unique pincodes to speed up first run). Currently fine since module-level geoCache de-dupes after first hit.
GeoInfo negative result is returned but never persisted: `info = GeoInfo(pincode=pincode, found=False); return info` — no insert_one for negative case. Mentioned above.
Distances shown rounded to 1 decimal (toFixed(1)) per spec. ✓
Filter dot is rendered as a small orange circle inside the active Find Space button — matches spec.
seed_data_creation: Created 3 seed loads via POST /api/loads with poster_phone 9000000001/9000000002/9000000003 and cargo_types Bags+Boxes / Pipes / Drums covering Delhi-Mumbai (110001->400001 and 110002->400002) and Bangalore-Chennai (560001->600001). UI test created profile 'FilterTester' / 9876543220 / TestFilterCo.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Find Space filter is fully functional end-to-end. Geocode endpoint correctly caches in pincode_geo Mongo collection (positive results only). All 5 filter rules verified: cargo type exact match, weight tons*1000>=kg, space_cuft>=volume, origin/dest distance<=30km haversine. UI shows distance chips, approx note, badge dot, clear button, inline error for invalid pincode, and empty state for zero matches. Cargo type rename Carton->Boxes is complete in both forms. Use mobile viewport 390x844. EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://transport-hub-305.preview.emergentagent.com.
rca_of_issue: N/A - no bugs found in this iteration.
